features.name: $countones with unpacked array argument
features.description: Code should include $countones system function call with an unpacked array as argument to trigger type checking error

features.name: unpacked array of logic type declaration
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration with logic element type to test type checking with system functions

features.name: unpacked array assignment via array literal
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array assigned via an array literal with mixed 0/1 values
